raw_source.title: [Remote] Litentry is looking for Backend Engineer
raw_source.body:
## About

[Litentry](https://www.litentry.com/) is a decentralized cross-chain Identity Aggregator that enables linking user identities across multiple networks. We are a vibrant and friendly blockchain startup founded in early 2019 in Berlin, Germany. Litentry received a grant from the Web3 Foundation at an early stage and then completed a million-dollar seed round of funding from FBG, Candaq, Altonomy, and BlockVC.

We believe that the world is a diverse place and people do not fit into neat boxes. We are looking for curious and empathetic individuals who are committed to developing themselves and building impactful things, and we are ready to help you do that.

As a Backend Engineer you will be an integral part of our software development team and contribute to our one or two product lines. The job is completely remote and has a flexible work schedule.

## Responsibilities

- Build and maintain SpringBoot/NodeJS/ExpressJS applications
- Managing hosting environments in AWS
- Troubleshooting and debugging
- Developing ideas for new programs or features

## Requirements

Experience with SpringBoot / Node.js / Typescript

- An interest in decentralized technology and Web 3
- Familiarity with all phases of the software development lifecycle
- Ability to write testable code
- You are a quick learner and problem solver

## Nice to Haves

- Familiarity with functional programming
- Hands-on experience with Rust
- Work experience with the Polkadot Substrate ecosystem and build related products
- Being an open-source contributor
- NFT familiarity
- Data indexing experience

## Job Nature

- Full-time
- Remote

## Salary and Benefits

25k~40k

## Contact

drop3@litentry.com
raw_source.author: liushooter
